diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers keep the claim unsupported, but they justify it differently. Option 2 cites the key decisive evidence only: evidence-003 directly states the cheap queue missed the SLA, which is sufficient to undercut the proposition "reuse_cheapest_queue" under a strict SLA context. Option 1 cites all four items, but evidence-001 and evidence-002 mainly provide context (budget-limited, strict SLA) and evidence-004 concerns a targeted component meeting SLA rather than supporting reuse of the cheapest queue, so the broader citation set is less focused. The reason codes are complementary rather than contradictory: "central_proposition_unsupported" gives the general failure-to-support diagnosis, while "counterexample_ignored" more specifically captures that evidence-003 functions as contrary evidence against reusing the cheapest queue. Confidence does not materially differ because both are marked high.
